mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO fund_portfolio_rsi_history ( rsi14, fund_count, fund_codes, data_date, data_time, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.rsi14}, #{item.fundCount}, #{item.fundCodes}, #{item.dataDate}, #{item.dataTime}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fund_portfolio_rsi_history WHERE data_date = #{dataDate} ORDER BY data_time DESC LIMIT 1
